[2018-05-31 23:00] cachotognax: I don't know how many people complain about this game being hard, but to me this game might not be the easiest, but I think it's definitively very easy to learn
[2018-05-31 23:01] shadourow (Rando): If you think about "easy to learn" about "easy to learn the rules of the game", ok
[2018-05-31 23:01] liadahlia (Lia): some mechanics in this game is counter intuitive
[2018-05-31 23:01] shadourow (Rando): But I don't think that you can say that ches is an "easy to learn" game, just because they are only 2 "weird" rules
[2018-05-31 23:01] liadahlia (Lia): and some fundamentals are also counterintuitive
[2018-05-31 23:02] amalloy: @Rando there are a lot more than 2 "weird" rules in chess
[2018-05-31 23:02] liadahlia (Lia): en passant :POGGERS:
[2018-05-31 23:02] cachotognax: for me, it's very easy to think after a game: "what I did wrong?" from just the replay and graphs, and you can analyze to awnser the question "what else could I have done?"
[2018-05-31 23:02] shadourow (Rando): ? "en passant", "castling" and... ? @amalloy
[2018-05-31 23:02] amalloy: the 50-move rule, for example. three-fold repetition
[2018-05-31 23:02] shadourow (Rando): Mmmh... ok, why not, that seems basic to me
[2018-05-31 23:02] liadahlia (Lia): yeah those are weird rules
[2018-05-31 23:03] liadahlia (Lia): they're just not rules you learn about until you've played the game for a while
[2018-05-31 23:03] shadourow (Rando): That just "how to tie rules"
[2018-05-31 23:03] amalloy: people always say it's super-easy to teach all the rules of chess quickly, but that's because they skip a bunch of the rules
[2018-05-31 23:03] cachotognax: Determinism, perfect information and not that many currencies make it easy to see the actual value of stuff
[2018-05-31 23:03] liadahlia (Lia): yeah, tie rules are weird
[2018-05-31 23:03] amalloy: even checking is pretty complicated
[2018-05-31 23:04] cachotognax: What are the counter-intuitive fundamentals? Either I think weird or I don't know them
[2018-05-31 23:04] shadourow (Rando): checking is just a rule about the main rule 'if you lose your king, you lose the game"
[2018-05-31 23:04] shadourow (Rando): And you add just a little rule about tie
[2018-05-31 23:04] liadahlia (Lia): in this game you stop droning much earlier than starcraft
[2018-05-31 23:04] shadourow (Rando): "if you can't make any legal move, that's a tie, including put you into a cheking position"
[2018-05-31 23:04] amalloy: @CachoTognax attack is good
[2018-05-31 23:05] liadahlia (Lia): so that's counterintuitive if you come from starcraft
[2018-05-31 23:05] cachotognax: yeah, I had to be told that after all 1 attack is like 2 gold but better
[2018-05-31 23:05] camzace: defenders advantage in starcraft is much larger though
[2018-05-31 23:05] liadahlia (Lia): attack being worse than gold before reaching absorb barrier and better than gold after isn't obvious right away
[2018-05-31 23:05] camzace: and ofc the defenders advantage in prismata is totally reliant on the random set
[2018-05-31 23:05] liadahlia (Lia): yeah but 1 attack isn't "2.33 gold or better"
[2018-05-31 23:05] liadahlia (Lia): the answer is "it depends"
[2018-05-31 23:05] cachotognax: plus in starcraft your units don't constantly attack.
[2018-05-31 23:06] cachotognax: that's the big deal here
[2018-05-31 23:06] amalloy: attack and defense being (mostly) separate pools is weird too
[2018-05-31 23:06] amalloy: most war games involve attackers dying in battle
[2018-05-31 23:06] camzace: most war games don't have freaking LASER MONKEYS
[2018-05-31 23:07] cachotognax: that's is quite an hole indeed
[2018-05-31 23:08] cachotognax: also since we are spaking starcraft can we say that the 3 currencies are not that far from the 3 races?
[2018-05-31 23:08] camzace: we sure can say that
[2018-05-31 23:08] liadahlia (Lia): i don't look at it like that
[2018-05-31 23:08] liadahlia (Lia): you can't be all 3 races at once
[2018-05-31 23:08] camzace: dark archon in brood war though
[2018-05-31 23:08] cachotognax: I'm talking theme wise, not mechanic wise
[2018-05-31 23:09] liadahlia (Lia): something something racism?
[2018-05-31 23:10] liadahlia (Lia): but no, i don't think tech colors are like races in starcraft at all
[2018-05-31 23:10] liadahlia (Lia): it's more like army archetypes
[2018-05-31 23:11] liadahlia (Lia): for example terran bio is more mobile and mech is more slow and siege-y
[2018-05-31 23:11] cachotognax: apollo and operative are blue, they are siegy
[2018-05-31 23:11] liadahlia (Lia): similar to how red is better at attacking but bad at defense and blue is good at defense but much worse at attacking
[2018-05-31 23:12] camzace: its why it's called tech
